judge_reason: Both descriptions agree on a single newspaper clipping as the primary visual element, but Description B adds specific details (title, date, location, content) not present in Description A, without contradiction on the visual content itself.
original_image_tags: A newspaper clipping pasted onto the center of the page.
gpt_mini_desc: *Image: A scanned document page with a small centered newspaper clipping titled “Boys Flying Saucer Hoax Stirs Police, FBI and Army,” plus a typed list of names in the upper right margin, handwritten notations and stamps, and a typed footer reading “JUL 12 1947 WASHINGTON STAR Page 1.”*
